title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform reliability and Salesforce integration robustness. Key improvements include better handling of Salesforce State/Country picklist configurations and enhanced deployment workflows, ensuring smoother data syncing and reduced setup complications for RevOps teams.

entries.headline: Improved Salesforce State/Country field detection and deployment reliability
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when Salesforce orgs use State/Country picklists, preventing common field mapping errors
Enhanced deployment validation ensures your Salesforce configurations deploy successfully
Improved retry logic handles temporary connection issues during complex deployments
